evals.prompt:
Optimize the supplied blog post using the seeds 'heat pump maintenance', 'heat pump service', and 'heat pump tune up'. Find the 20 best low-hanging-fruit keywords and give me three distinct optimization approaches.

[Complete blog post text follows.]
evals.expected_output: Makes exactly one Related Keywords call per seed with depth 2 and limit 50, combines and deduplicates the rows, filters against the supplied text, ranks supported low-difficulty opportunities, produces three concrete approaches, and writes the dated report.
assertions: All three calls use the same disclosed market and request no more than 50 related keywords per seed.
The final table preserves seed provenance and uses organic keyword difficulty rather than Ads competition as the ranking-competition signal.
The opportunity formula and difficulty-band ordering are disclosed and the list contains no keyword with difficulty 50 or higher.
The three approaches are materially different and map selected keywords to exact parts of the supplied text.

evals.prompt: Find low-hanging-fruit keywords for this article.
evals.expected_output: Asks for both the complete text and one to three seed keywords, then waits without making a DataForSEO call.
assertions: The response asks for all missing required inputs together.
No billable call or report is produced before the inputs are supplied.

evals.prompt: Optimize the German article in artikel.md for 'wärmepumpe wartung' and 'wärmepumpe service'.
evals.expected_output: Detects that the text and seeds conflict with the English default and asks for the intended DataForSEO location and language before making billable calls.
assertions: The workflow does not silently run German keywords against the United States/en default.
No DataForSEO call is made until the market is resolved.

evals.prompt:
Optimize this short niche article for 'heritage lime kiln' in the United States and English. Return 20 low-hanging-fruit terms.

[Complete niche article text follows.]
evals.expected_output: Uses one Related Keywords call and reports fewer than 20 candidates when the validated response does not contain 20 relevant rows with positive volume and keyword difficulty below 50.
assertions: Missing metrics are not converted to zero and irrelevant terms are excluded with reasons.
The workflow does not fabricate or mislabel higher-difficulty terms merely to reach 20 rows.
